Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

CTN 4, 056 [Babylonian Almanac][via cams/gkab]

o i 1'o 1'

(o i 1') On the 20th day [...].

(o i 2') On the 21st day [...].

(o i 3') On the 22nd day [...].

(o i 4') On the 23rd day, (at) midday ... [...].

U₄ 24-KAM₂ ⸢MA?⸣ [...]

(o i 5') On the 24th day ... [...].

o i 6'6'

U₄ 25-KAM₂ NU [...]

(o i 6') On the 25th day ... [...].

o i 7'7'

U₄ 26-KAM₂ U₄.SA₉-AM₃ [...]

(o i 7') On the 26th day, (at) midday [...].

o i 8'8'

U₄ 27-KAM₂ GABA.⸢RAḪ₂.ḪI⸣ [...]

(o i 8') On the 27th day: panic [...].

o i 9'9'

U₄ 28-KAM₂ KAŠ NU.UN.DU.SUM [...]

(o i 9') On the 28th day: he should not give beer [...].

o i 10'10'

U₄ 29-⸢KAM₂⸣ ZI.GA KU₄ [...]

(o i 10') On the 29th day: loss of income [...].

o i 11'11'

U₄ 30-⸢KAM₂⸣ ZI.GA x [...]

(o i 11') On the 30st day: loss ... [...].

o i 12'12'

* itiGU₄ U₄ 1-<KAM₂> NU.UN.ŠE.GE.DA [...]

(o i 12') (In) Ayyaru (Month II), the 1st day is not favourable.

o i 13'13'

U₄ 2-KAM₂ AB.ŠE.GE.DA [...]

(o i 13') The 2nd day is favourable.

o i 14'14'

U₄ 3-KAM₂ ŠE NA.AN.SUM.MU

(o i 14') On the 3rd day: he should not give barley.

o i 15'15'

U₄ 4-KAM₂ SILA AL.DIB <<⸢SILA AL.DIB⸣>> BA.AN!.BU.RU

(o i 15') On the 4th day: he should go along the street; (or) he should release.

o i 16'16'

U₄ 5-KAM₂ DAM NA.⸢AN.TUKU⸣.TUKU NU LIBIRra [...]

(o i 16') On the 5th day: he should not acquire a wife; (or) he will not live long.

o i 17'17'

U₄ 6-KAM₂ ⸢DAM?⸣ ḪE₂.TUKU [...]

(o i 17') On the 6th day: may he acquire a wife.

o i 18'18'

U₄ ⸢7⸣-[KAM₂ ...]

(o i 18') On the 7th day [...].

o i 19'19'

⸢U₄⸣ [...]

(o i 19') On the [...] day [...].

(o ii 9') [...] it is favourable.

[...] DU ti-bu kaš-du

(o ii 10'') [...] he should go...; (or) the attack will be successful.

(o ii 11'') [...] confusion.

o ii 12''12''

(o ii 12'') [...] it is favourable.

o ii 16''16''

[...]-KAM₂ KURUM₆-su ana dGU.LA GAR ŠE.GE.DA!(BI)

(o ii 16'') [...] he should place his offering for Gula: it is favourable.

o ii 17''17''

[...] x-KAM₂ NU.UN.ŠE.GE.DA

(o ii 17'') [...] it is unfavourable.

o ii 18''18''

[...] 12?-KAM₂ IDIM AB.ŠE.GE.DA

(o ii 18'') On the 12th day: (as for) the nobleman, it is favourable.

[...] x x NU.UN.ŠE.GE.DA

(o ii 19'') [...] ... it is unfavourable.

o ii 20''20''

(o ii 21'') [...] it is favourable.

* itiKIN U₄ 1-KAM₂ AB.ŠE.⸢GE⸣.[DA]

(o iii 2') (In) Ululu (Month VI), the 1st day is favourable.

(o iii 3') The 2nd day is favourable.

o iii 9'9'

⸢U₄⸣ [8]-⸢KAM₂⸣ LU₂ NE GA.BA.AL! NA.AN.ŠU.ZI2

(o iii 9') On the 8th day: that man will become hostile; (or) will not become furious.

o iii 10'10'

(r i 13'') The 28th day is totally favourable.

(r ii 21'') [...] it is favourable.

r ii 22''22''

[... NU].UN.[ŠE.GE].⸢DA⸣

(r ii 22'') [...] it is unfavourable.

r ii 23''23''

[...] AB.[ŠE].⸢GE⸣.DA

(r ii 23'') [...] it is favourable.

r ii 24''24''

[... AB.ŠE].GE.DA

(r ii 24'') [...] it is favourable.

r ii 25''25''

[...] DA

(r ii 25'') [...] ....

r ii 26''26''

[...] DA

(r ii 26'') [...] ....

(rest of column missing)
double vertical ruling between column 2 and 3
Column iii
(start of column missing)
r iii 1'r 1'

* x

(r iii 1') ... [...]

r iii 2'2'

* ⸢iti⸣[ŠU ...]

(r iii 2') (In) Duʾuzu (Month IV) [...].

r iii 3'3'

* ⸢iti⸣[NE ...]

(r iii 3') (In) Abu (Month V) [...].

r iii 4'4'

* iti⸢KIN⸣ [...]

(r iii 4') (In) Ululu (Month VI) [...].

r iii 5'5'

* ⸢itiDU₆⸣ 2 x [...]

(r iii 5') (In) Tašritu (Month VII, day) 2 ... [...].

r iii 6'6'

* itiAPIN 2 4 5 8 11 12 [...]

(r iii 6') (In) Arahsamnu (Month VIII, days) 2, 4, 5, 8, 11, 12 [...].

r iii 7'7'

* itiGAN 6 7 11 12 14 ⸢15?⸣ x [...]

(r iii 7') (In) Kislimu (Month IX, days) 6, 7, 11, 12, 14, 15 ... [...].

r iii 8'8'

* itiAB 3 4 10 11 BAR 20 22 23 ⸢24⸣ x [...]

(r iii 8') (In) Ṭebetu (Month X, days) 3, 4, 10, 11, middle (of day) 20, (days) 22, 23, 24 ... [...].

r iii 9'9'

* itiZIZ₂ 4 10 12 13 14 17 19v 21 22 24 ⸢26 30? AŠ?⸣

(r iii 9') (In) Šabaṭu (Month XI, days) 4, 10, 12, 13, 14, 17, 19, 21, 22, 24, 26, 30, ....

r iii 10'10'

* itiŠE ⸢2?⸣ 7 10 11 13 14 17 19v 21 22 24 26 30 AŠ

(r iii 10') (In) Addaru (Month XII, days) 2, 7, 10, 11, 13, 14, 17, 19, 21, 22, 24, 26, 30, ....

r iii 11'11'

* itiDIRI!(KAL)ŠE 2 4 5 9v 10 15 17 19v 20 22 25 26 28 30 AŠ₂

(r iii 11') (In) Intercalary Addaru (days) 2, 4, 5, 9, 10, 15, 17, 19, 20, 22, 25, 26, 28, 30, ....

r iii 12'12'

[... GU₇] ka-ra-ši itiGU₄ itiNE itiKIN NU SIG₅

(r iii 12') [...] eating leeks (in) Ayyaru (Month II), Abu (Month V), Ululu (Month VI) is not favourable.

r iii 13'13'

[...] x la₃ zik₂-ri itiSIG₄

(r iii 13') [...] without reputation (in) Simanu (Month III), [...], Ṭebetu (Month X), Šabaṭu (Month XI) is not favourable.

r iii 14'14'

[...] ⸢iti⸣AB itiZIZ₂ NU SIG₅

r iii 15'15'

[...] x RU TU SIG₅

(r iii 15'') [...] ... is favourable.

r iii 16'16'

[...] x x x

(r iii 16'') [...] ....

(rest of column missing)

1it looks as if the ŠE-sign has been erased.

2The sign AL is written with a double vertical wedge at the end.

3the text bears ṣi₂-ih-tu₄ "laughter", which could also make sense here. It must be a scribal mistake for izzimtu however, because the second word is well-attested in parallel texts (see Labat RA 38, 1941: 33).

Created by Marie-Françoise Besnier for the AHRC-funded GKAB Project, 2010 and released under the Creative Commons Attribution Share-Alike license 3.0. Please cite this page as http://oracc.org/cams/gkab/P363471
